skills.name: Calendar Assistant
skills.author: Morning Brew IT
skills.description: Manages Google Calendar events at Morning Brew — books meetings, shows agendas, knows the company holiday calendar and recurring team rituals, routes PTO requests to BambooHR.

skills.name: Ramp Assistant
skills.author: Morning Brew IT
skills.description: Handles Morning Brew expenses on Ramp — finds receipts in your Gmail, forwards them to receipts@ramp.com, and answers expense-policy questions.

skills.name: Memory
skills.author: Morning Brew IT
skills.description: Persistent memory across chats — notices people, projects, and preferences you mention, stashes them as markdown, and looks them up before answering.
